# Starbuster Blade
# https://rotfserver.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Starbuster%20Blade&prop=wikitext

{{ItemInfo
| name = Starbuster Blade
| slot = sword
| tier = GL
| soulbound = yes
| desc = A sword forged from a comet, imbued with the energy of a supernova star.

| rof = 100
| range = yes
| projSpeed = 10
| lifetime = 430
| minDmg = 240
| maxDmg = 300
| fameb = 6

|lootbag = white
|dropsFrom = is obtainable from Galactic Zones}}

<noinclude>
[[Category:Swords]]
{{NavSwords}}
</noinclude>
